name: jsql-syntax
description: SQL + Jinja2 syntax highlighting for JSql query patterns in Python

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with JSql Syntax
walkthroughs.description: SQL highlighting, schema intelligence, and formatting for Python — in 5 steps.

steps.title: Instant SQL syntax highlighting
steps.description:
JSql highlights keywords, functions, tables, columns, aliases, strings, and booleans — all inside triple-quoted Python strings. Use ``--bq`` or ``--spanner`` for BigQuery/Spanner dialect.

[Choose a Theme](command:jsqlSyntax.selectTheme)

media.altText: SQL syntax highlighting with colored tokens

steps.title: Register your schema sources
steps.description:
Point JSql at your SQLAlchemy model files. It parses ``__tablename__`` and ``sa.Column`` definitions to power coloring, warnings, hover docs, and completions.

[Add Schema Source](command:jsqlSyntax.manageScopes)

steps.title: Map directories to schema sources
steps.description:
In a monorepo, different services use different tables. Map directory prefixes to schema sources so each service only sees its own tables.

[Manage Scopes](command:jsqlSyntax.manageScopes)

media.altText: Directory prefix to schema source mapping

steps.title: Format SQL with one command
steps.description:
Place your cursor inside any SQL triple-quoted block and run Format SQL. JSql reformats keywords, indents clauses, expands SELECT columns, and preserves all Jinja templates.

[Format SQL](command:jsqlSyntax.formatSQL)

steps.title: Navigate and rename SQL symbols
steps.description:
**F12** on a table name jumps to its model definition. **F12** on a column jumps to the FROM/JOIN. **F2** renames an alias throughout the block. Type ``alias.`` for column completions.

[Open Feature Tour](command:jsqlSyntax.openWelcome)

enumDescriptions: Dracula — cyan keywords, pink functions, green strings
Monokai — red keywords, green functions, yellow strings
One Dark — purple keywords, blue functions, green strings
jsqlSyntax.theme.description: Color theme for JSql syntax highlighting

jsqlSyntax.tableDefinitionFiles.description: Workspace-relative glob patterns for Python model files such as tables.py. Parsed __tablename__ and sa.Column definitions are used to color known SQL tables and columns.

jsqlSyntax.schemaSources.description: Named schema sources. Each key is a name (e.g. "liblms"), value is an array of workspace-relative glob patterns pointing to table definition files.

jsqlSyntax.prefixMappings.description: Maps directory prefixes to schema source names. Files under a prefix will only see tables from the mapped source.

prefix.description: Workspace-relative directory prefix or **/name glob, e.g. "src/applms" or "**/applms"

source.description: Name of a schema source defined in jsqlSyntax.schemaSources

jsqlSyntax.showWelcomeOnStartup.description: Show the JSql welcome page when the extension first activates.

jsqlSyntax.semanticWarnings.description: Enable schema-aware SQL warnings for unknown tables and invalid qualified columns using the loaded table definition files.
